summary: The office bot showed notable confusion about the provider's name when confirming the appointment after the patient's preference update, potentially leading to misunderstanding.

bugs.title: Provider Name Inconsistency During Confirmation
bugs.description: After the patient agreed to book a 12 PM appointment with 'Dr. Dunty Hauser,' the bot confirmed the appointment as being with 'Dr. Judy Hauser' and later as 'Dr. Dugie Hauser.'
bugs.why_it_matters: Provider confusion could result in the patient being scheduled with the wrong doctor or create uncertainty, especially since names were similar but not identical. This undermines trust and could impact care continuity.
bugs.transcript_evidence:
Patient: ...with Dr. Dunty Hauser, please.
User: ...with doctor Judy Hauser...
User: ...with doctor Dugie Hauser...
bugs.suggested_fix: Ensure the system maintains consistent provider identity throughout the booking workflow, especially after a preference update.

strengths: Successfully adapted to the patient's updated time preference without confusion about availability.
